links.source_research_note: Tennessee Information Protection Act (TIPA) — Public Chapter 1140 (2023).
links.acquisition_blocker_resolved: PDF URL https://publications.tnsosfiles.com/acts/113/pub/pc1140.pdf returns HTTP 403 from both my IP and the GPU box (publications.tnsosfiles.com explicitly bot-blocks curl; XML response body suggests a WAF). LegiScan also 403s. No archived snapshot on Wayback. Needs manual browser download — open URL in browser, save as PDF to control/.../tipa.pdf, then run tools-resources/utils/pdf_to_md_via_gpu.sh.

current_extraction.notes: Downloaded the Public Chapter 408 (113th GA, 2023) PDF and extracted via pdftotext -layout. The original metadata URL pointed at pc1140.pdf (wrong chapter number). TIPA effective 2025-07-01; to be codified at Tenn. Code Ann. § 47-18-3201 et seq. The PDF is a scanned printed version of the enrolled act, so the text has some OCR-style imperfections in headers but the legal text is intact.
